scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @r-a-i-t-h/viz-protocol && npm run build -w @r-a-i-t-h/viz-host
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n demo,viz -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:demo" "npm run dev:visualizer"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && tsc -b && npm run build:visualizer && npm run build:demo
scripts.preview: concurrently -n demo,viz -c blue,magenta "npm run preview:demo" "npm run preview:visualizer"
